title: Formating Data in Cells
text: Formating Data in Cells If the item string specifies more than one field, the data returned is separated by tabs. If more than one occurrence is returned, the occurrences are separated with carriage return and linefeed pairs. This is acceptable for word processing, but in spreadsheets you would want the data to be organized in cells. To format data in cells: Select the range of cells where you want the data to appear. Enter the programmed link formula. Do not forget the quotes around the item name, and omit the braces characters ( {} ), since these will be added by the client app. Press Control+Shift+Enter to spread the data over the specified cells.
